tasks.name: Brownfield gotcha catch
tasks.type: objective (3 seeded defects + real Apolaki auth code)

opus48.note: +1 vs default: gates can be mounted independently / out of order.

sonnet5.note: +1 vs default: distinct error codes leak an enumeration oracle.

opus48.note: ~2.2x longer than default; more exhaustive threat/edge coverage, same rubric structure (diminishing returns).

sonnet5.note: ~1.9x longer than default; deeper domain + threat detail, same rubric structure.

opus48.note: +3 vs default (HEAD->GET, req.user trust invariant, dead-rule normalization) but STILL missed the stateful g/y regex bug — blind spot effort didn't fix.

sonnet5.note: +4 vs default; CONVERGED onto Opus's default strengths (unknown-role-should-deny, permission, boundary, first-match ordering).
